proof_summary: Replaced the 135-line implementation-heavy canonical anchor with compact-v2: a 65-line semantic North Star containing the approved statement, five immutable IDs (NS-IDENTITY, NS-ACTION, NS-PRODUCT, NS-AUTHORITY, NS-EVOLUTION), one success test, and pointers to coverage, task graph, architecture, and proof surfaces. Preserved the prior revision in Git history and archive 20260710T175557Z. The canonical graph contains 89 rows and zero Ready tasks.
